metadata.description: Cross-government organisational dependency graph with governance, data sharing, platform, regulatory, operational, and financial relationships.
metadata.methodology: Derived from: (1) gov.uk organisation hierarchy, (2) digital service register multi-org assignments, (3) published data sharing agreements and legislation, (4) known operational/platform dependencies.

dependency_types.data_sharing: Known data exchange arrangement (legislative or MOU basis)
dependency_types.financial: Funding, budget allocation, or financial flow
